.gitignore.general_idea: Add macOS-specific metadata file to gitignore to prevent committing local system artifacts.
Add Stryker mutation testing temporary directory to gitignore to exclude generated test artifacts.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven-bundled JDK 11 to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21 runtime.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 21; running it on a JDK 11 base image would result in runtime errors due to unsupported class file versions or missing APIs.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian-based package management (apt-get) with Alpine-based package management (apk) to match the new base image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not include apt-get; using apt-get would cause a command not found error during build.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update Node.js installation method from NodeSource setup script for v12 to NVM for v20 to align with modern frontend tooling requirements.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Node.js 12 is end-of-life and incompatible with modern frontend dependencies; the build would fail to install or run npm packages without a supported Node version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer required for the deployment strategy.
Add Maven installation via apk since the new base image does not include Maven.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build step `mvn clean package` requires Maven, which is not present in the `bellsoft/liberica-openjdk-alpine:21` image; the build would fail without it.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required by native libraries or tools in the Alpine environment.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some native dependencies or tools may fail to load or run without the C++ standard library on Alpine.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Git installation to support build steps that require version control information.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process or plugins may require Git to be present to read repository metadata.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the build context and copy strategy to copy the entire directory including git info to /home/app.
Set PRODUCTION environment variable to true to configure the application for production mode.
Update the Maven build command to run in production profile and skip tests.
Replace the generic bash command with a specific entrypoint to run the packaged JAR file.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous CMD ["/bin/bash"] would start an interactive shell instead of running the application, causing the container to not serve traffic.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect a change in the project's identity or purpose.

frontend/.eslintrc.json.general_idea: Add 'react-app/jest' to ESLint extends to support Jest globals in the main configuration.
Disable the 'testing-library/no-node-access' rule to allow direct DOM node access in tests.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Add storybook log files to the frontend gitignore to prevent committing debug logs.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook configuration to use the new framework object syntax required by Storybook 8.
Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory in Storybook.
Remove custom webpack plugin configuration that forced build failure on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or deprecation in the new setup.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Update addons list to include new Storybook 8 recommended addons and remove deprecated ones.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support the new toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker integration in Storybook.
Add import for useLocation from react-router-dom to support the new conditional decorator logic.
Add imports for react-toastify components to display navigation warnings.
Add import for useEffect from react to handle side effects in the new decorator.
Initialize MSW in the preview configuration to enable API mocking.
Refactor decorators to conditionally apply MemoryRouter and show toast notifications on navigation.
Update Storybook preview configuration to use the new default export format and add controls parameters.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern development.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation of Java 21 features or causes warnings/errors depending on plugin config.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Spring Framework 6) due to package refactoring (javax to jakarta) and API changes, causing compile/runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Validation API to replace implicit javax.validation provided by older Spring Boot versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* packages); javax.validation classes are no longer available on the classpath by default, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if referenced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC version to 4.1.3 to match Spring Boot 3.3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3; using the old version causes dependency conflicts and runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0 to support modern frontend tooling.
pom.xml.why_exists: Node.js v12 is EOL and incompatible with modern npm packages and build tools required by the updated frontend code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add MongoDB starter dependency to enable data persistence layer.
Add Awaitility dependency for testing asynchronous operations.
Add explicit Spring Security Config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add OpenCSV dependency for CSV processing capabilities.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin to the build process.
Add Git Code Format Maven plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Add Git Commit ID Maven plugin to generate git properties during build.
Update JaCoCo plugin configuration to include new coverage rules and exclude patterns for the renamed package.
Rename project artifact and name from 'kitchensink' to 'courses' to reflect the new application identity.
Update project description to match the new application name.
Add new Maven properties for package naming and target classes configuration.
